&Schema = !'dbo' &DatabaseName = !'BASE_ROLIVEIRA' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'Default',!'Propriedades', &ServerName, &DatabaseName, &Schema) &AuditSchema = !'auditplus' &AuditDatabaseName = !'BASE_ERPAUDIT' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'AuditPlus',!'AuditRecord', &AuditServerName, &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema)
Do Case Case &operation = !'DRP' Do 'Drop' Case &operation = !'INS' Do 'Insert' Case &operation = !'UPD' Do 'Update' Case &operation = !'DLT' Do 'Delete' EndCase
Sub 'Drop' &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditPropriedadesInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditPropriedadesUpdate]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditPropriedadesDelete]", &Schema) + NewLine()
EndSub
Sub 'Insert' &auditData += format(!"CREATE TRIGGER [%1].[AuditPropriedadesInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"ON [%1].[Propriedades]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"AFTER INSERT" + NewLine() &auditData += !"AS" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET NOCOUNT ON;" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += @DatabaseUser VarChar(80)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @UserNameVar VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ExtraInfo VarChar(1000)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @index decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordSessionId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastTableId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpEnd_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpEndNro_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpEndCpl_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + @PrpRotVis_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpSts_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpSts_EV_Ins VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpNom_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpEndComNom_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @PrpVenCodIns_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" &auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Inserted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, PrpCod, PrpEnd, PrpEndNro, PrpEndCpl, PrpEndBai, PrpEndCep, PrpEndCidCod, PrpOrcSts, PrpRotVis, PrpSts, PrpArmGra, PrpArmIns, PrpRotAce, PrpFrmLav, PrpPerNeg, PrpNom, PrpEndComNom, PrpVenCodIns, PrpEndDen, PrpIns, PrpAtvPri FROM INSERTED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @DatabaseUser = SUSER_NAME()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AuditPlusSessionContext') IS NOT NULL BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @UserNameVar = username, @AuditRecordSessionId = sessionid, @AuditRecordLastId = auditid, @AuditRecordLastTableId = tableid, @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = recordkeys, @ExtraInfo = extrainfo FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END ELSE BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CREATE TABLE #AuditPlusSessionContext (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VarChar(100), sessionid VarChar(36), auditid decimal(10,0), tableid VarChar(36), recordkeys VarChar(800), extrainfo VarChar(1000));" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @UserNameVar = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordSessionId = CAST(NEWID() as VarChar(36))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastTableId = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ExtraInfo = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONTEXT_INFO()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = CONVERT(tinyint, SUBSTRING(@Context, 1, 1))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CONVERT(varchar(10), SUBSTRING(@Context, 2, 1 + @ContextLength))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @ContextTxt IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(@ContextTxt) = 1 BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @AuditRecordLastId = CONVERT(float, @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"SELECT @AuditRecordSessionId = [AuditRecordSessionId], @AuditRecordLastTableId = [AuditRecordTableGuid], @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = [AuditRecordKeyValue] FROM [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord] WHERE [AuditRecordId] = @AuditRecordLastId;", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Inserted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Inserted_Records INTO
